## Description

Provide a summary of the changes and the reasoning behind them. If this addresses an existing issue, please link it here (e.g., "Closes #123").

## Type of Change

Please delete options that are not relevant.

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Code style update / refactoring
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Configuration / Build system change

## How Has This Been Tested?

Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes. Provide instructions so we can reproduce.

- [ ] Run `./gradlew ktlintFormat` to clean up syntax formatting.
- [ ] Run `./gradlew ktlintCheck` to ensure no linting errors are present.
- [ ] Run `./gradlew test` (Local Unit Tests).
- [ ] Run `./gradlew connectedAndroidTest` (Instrumented Android Tests on emulator/device).
- [ ] Manual test verification (please describe steps):

## Checklist:

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (`README.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`) if applicable.
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or lint errors.
